nodes.label: स्वतंत्रता की ओर (Towards Freedom)
nodes.description: A story about India's freedom struggle, patriotism, and the journey to independence

nodes.label: स्वतंत्रता संग्राम (Freedom Struggle)
nodes.description: India's long fight against British rule from the 1800s to 1947

nodes.label: अहिंसा (Non-Violence)
nodes.description: Gandhi's method of peaceful protest without using force or violence

nodes.label: सत्याग्रह (Satyagraha)
nodes.description: Holding firmly to truth - peaceful resistance to injustice

nodes.label: स्वदेशी आंदोलन (Swadeshi Movement)
nodes.description: Boycotting foreign goods and using Indian-made products like khadi

nodes.label: महान नेता (Great Leaders)
nodes.description: The brave leaders who guided India's freedom movement

nodes.label: महात्मा गांधी
nodes.description: Father of the Nation - led India through non-violence and truth

nodes.label: अन्य स्वतंत्रता सेनानी
nodes.description: Nehru, Bose, Bhagat Singh, Lakshmibai, and many more brave fighters

nodes.label: मूल्य और सीख (Values & Lessons)
nodes.description: Important values we learn from the freedom struggle story

nodes.label: देशभक्ति (Patriotism)
nodes.description: Love for one's country and willingness to serve it

nodes.label: बलिदान (Sacrifice)
nodes.description: Giving up personal comfort for a greater cause

nodes.label: एकता (Unity)
nodes.description: People of all backgrounds came together to fight for freedom

nodes.label: राष्ट्रीय प्रतीक (National Symbols)
nodes.description: Symbols of independent India born from the freedom movement

nodes.label: तिरंगा (Tricolour Flag)
nodes.description: The national flag with saffron, white, green and the Ashoka Chakra
